title: ashishpatel26/500-AI-Agents-Projects
abstract: A curated collection of 500 AI agent use cases across various industries including healthcare, finance, education, retail. Showcases practical applications with links to open-source projects.
abstract_zh: 500个AI Agent用例大全！跨越医疗、金融、教育、零售等多个行业，每个用例都附有开源项目链接。既是AI Agent的百科全书，也是快速搭建项目的灵感库。
